parent_nodes.title: Surface PRD next-command handoff on the PRD issue
parent_nodes.completion_condition: All child leaf nodes are completed, deferred, or linked as follow-up, and the durable decision is captured before closeout.

leaf_nodes.title: Confirm current PRD handoff behavior and exact missing user-facing next command
leaf_nodes.commit_intent: Record the observed product gap and target behavior before implementation.

leaf_nodes.title: Implement deterministic PRD issue next-command handoff surfacing
leaf_nodes.commit_intent: Expose the next command in the appropriate PRD issue flow without broadening report-only defaults.

leaf_nodes.title: Verify the issue-backlog-triage to roadmap activation dogfood chain and document evidence
leaf_nodes.commit_intent: Prove the route chain remains replayable and side-effect boundaries are clear.

closeout.post_merge_branch_cleanup: delete merged roadmap branch by default
closeout.carrier_issue_cleanup: post-merge closeout may close only #70 if the PR contract is present and guards pass
